armorposer.config.allowScrolling.tooltip: Allow scrolling to increase / decrease an angle value in the posing screen
armorposer.config.directNametagOnly.tool: Only render the nametag when directly looking at the Armor Stand. Set to false to use vanilla behavior
armorposer.config.enableConfigGui.toolti: Show the Armor Stand configuration GUI on shift right click
armorposer.config.enableNameTags.tooltip: Allow Armor Stand to be renamed using name tags
armorposer.config.nameBasedFeatures.tool: Allow the spawned Armor Stand to have settings set based on its name
The distance squared at which Armor Stand nametags are rendered. Set to 0 to use vanilla behavior

armorposer.config.restrictAlignToOP.tool: Restrict the ability to resize the Armor Stand to server operators

armorposer.config.restrictPositionToOp.t: Restrict the ability to position the Armor Stand to server operators
armorposer.config.restrictResizeToOP.too: Restrict the ability to resize the Armor Stand to server operators
armorposer.config.restrictRotationToOP.t: List of players allowed to bypass enabled restrictions. Entries can be either a username to bypass all restrictions (e.g. "shynieke") or a specific restriction using the format "username,feature" (e.g. "shynieke,resize").
armorposer.config.restrictShowArmsToOP.t: Restrict the ability to toggle arms to server operators
armorposer.config.restrictSmallToOP.tool: Restrict the ability to toggle small size to server operators
